name: Easter Gold Metal Laying Bunny - Threshold™
description:
This Easter Gold Metal Laying Bunny from Threshold™ brings glam shine to your seasonal decor. This Easter gold-tone laying bunny features a sculptural design that adds elegant, eye-catching style to your springtime celebrations. Crafted from metal and designed for indoor use, this decorative bunny is perfect for elevating your Easter decorations with a sophisticated metallic accent. Display it as a standalone statement piece or pair it with other seasonal decor for a coordinated, polished look.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
